isolation.note: Unit tests are self-contained, no special isolation needed

assertions.title: 左键单击歌单列表项选中

steps.action: Create AppSnapshot with View::Playlists, 3 playlists, logged_in=true
steps.expected: AppSnapshot ready for mouse click testing

steps.action: Simulate left-click on left panel (col=5, row=HEADER_HEIGHT+3) mapping to playlist item index 2
steps.expected: AppCommand::PlaylistsMoveTo { index: 2 } sent, playlists_selected updates to index 2
steps.observed: Received AppCommand::PlaylistsMoveTo { index: 2 }, no other commands sent

assertions.title: 左键单击歌曲列表项选中

steps.action: Create AppSnapshot with View::Playlists, PlaylistMode::Tracks, 4 songs, logged_in=true
steps.expected: AppSnapshot ready for mouse click testing

steps.action: Simulate left-click on center panel (col=LEFT_WIDTH+10, row=HEADER_HEIGHT+4) mapping to track item index 3
steps.expected: AppCommand::PlaylistTracksMoveTo { index: 3 } sent, playlist_tracks_selected updates to index 3
steps.observed: Received AppCommand::PlaylistTracksMoveTo { index: 3 }, no other commands sent

assertions.title: 左键单击搜索结果选中

steps.action: Create AppSnapshot with View::Search, 3 search results, logged_in=true
steps.expected: AppSnapshot ready for mouse click testing

steps.action: Simulate left-click on center panel (col=LEFT_WIDTH+10, row=HEADER_HEIGHT+2) mapping to search result index 1
steps.expected: AppCommand::SearchMoveTo { index: 1 } sent, search_selected updates to index 1
steps.observed: Received AppCommand::SearchMoveTo { index: 1 }, no other commands sent

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-MOUSE-001 (playlist list click select), VAL-MOUSE-002 (playlist tracks click select), VAL-MOUSE-003 (search result click select) all confirmed working correctly via cargo test.
